    Address row for searchable ComboBox pickers with formatted labels in the editor.

    ALL_STATUSES - Static variable in class com.sait.workshop05.util.OrderStatus
    Full status list for editable dropdowns without the filter-only All option.
    ApiClient - Class in com.sait.workshop05.api
    Singleton HTTP client for the Workshop 7 Spring Boot API (springdoc OpenAPI on the server).
    apply(TextField) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.PhoneFieldFormatter
    Attaches the formatter to the given field.
    applyLoginShellBounds(Stage) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.StageSizing
    Applies login shell dimensions used before authentication.
    applyMainShellBounds(Stage) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.StageSizing
    Sets min size then outer size then centers so cold boot and login and logout share the same geometry steps.
